mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account ( ws_phone, account_type, device_os, number_source, channel_name, ownership, lease_until, account_group_id, protocol_id, protocol_account_id, protocol_address, priority, dispatched_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{wsPhone}, #{accountType}, #{deviceOs}, #{numberSource}, #{channelName}, #{ownership}, #{leaseUntil}, #{accountGroupId}, #{protocolId}, #{protocolAccountId}, #{protocolAddress}, #{priority}, #{dispatchedAt}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM account WHERE ws_phone = #{wsPhone} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM account WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM account WHERE protocol_account_id = #{protocolAccountId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

select.if: SELECT * FROM account WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id IN #{i}

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id LEFT JOIN account_group g ON g.id = a.account_group_id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE

SELECT a.id, a.ws_phone AS wsPhone, a.account_type AS accountType, a.device_os AS deviceOs, a.number_source AS numberSource, a.channel_name AS channelName, a.protocol_id AS protocolId, a.account_group_id AS accountGroupId, g.name AS groupName, a.ownership, a.lease_until AS leaseUntil, a.dispatched_at AS dispatchedAt, a.created_at AS createdAt, s.account_state AS accountState, s.login_state AS loginState, s.risk_status AS riskStatus, s.risk_end_time AS riskEndTime, s.cooldown_until AS cooldownUntil, s.mute_status AS muteStatus, s.block_error_code AS blockErrorCode, s.block_reason AS blockReason, s.state_source AS stateSource, s.truth_ip AS truthIp, s.proxy_country AS proxyCountry, s.pull_into_group_count AS pullIntoGroupCount, s.invalidated_at AS invalidatedAt, s.last_state_sync_time AS lastStateSyncTime FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id LEFT JOIN account_group g ON g.id = a.account_group_id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.login_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS online, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.login_state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS offline, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.account_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS banned, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.risk_status > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS risk, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.dispatched_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS assigned FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL

select.if: SELECT a.id, s.account_state AS accountState, a.dispatched_at AS dispatchedAt FROM account a LEFT JOIN account_state s ON s.account_id = a.id AND s.tenant_id = a.tenant_id WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.id IN #{i}
SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS accountState, NULL AS dispatchedAt FROM DUAL WHERE 1=0
